title: LabelsFile
description: Top-level wrapper schema for *.labels.json. The two prior reviews validated the ground_truth_context / context_ground_truth sub-objects but left the wrapper unconstrained, so a misplaced key at this level (e.g. forbidden_capabilities at the wrapper instead of inside context_ground_truth) silently passed validation and degraded CapabilityPrecision scoring. README states 'typos in field names fail the build'; this schema makes that claim true at the wrapper level too.

task_id.description: Globally-unique kebab-case slug (matches README 'Adding a new workload's labels' step 2). Uniqueness is enforced by the test, shape is enforced here.
